name: [auto_patrol] Tool 5-in-3-out check
description:
檢查所有機台，最近5次的process 記錄，並且顯示這5次的process
檢查是否5次的process 記錄有大於3次的OOC
steps_mapping:
[{"step_id": "step1", "nl_segment": "取得目標機台最近5次的SPC process記錄", "python_code": "history = await execute_mcp('get_object_snapshot_history', {'targetID': equipment_id, 'objectName': 'SPC'})
history = history if isinstance(history, list) else []
recent = history[-5:] if len(history) >= 5 else history"}, {"step_id": "step2", "nl_segment": "從記錄中計算OOC次數並判斷是否超過3次", "python_code": "ooc_count = sum(1 for r in recent if r.get('spc_status') == 'OOC')
condition_met = ooc_count > 3"}, {"step_id": "step3", "nl_segment": "整理5筆記錄的詳細資訊並輸出診斷結果", "python_code": "records = [{"spc_status": r.get("spc_status"), "value": r.get("charts",{}).get("xbar_chart",{}).get("value"), "ucl": r.get("charts",{}).get("xbar_chart",{}).get("ucl"), "lcl": r.get("charts",{}).get("xbar_chart",{}).get("lcl"), "is_ooc": r.get("spc_status")=="OOC"} for r in recent]
_findings = {"condition_met": condition_met, "summary": f"機台 {equipment_id} 最近 {len(recent)} 次 process 中有 {ooc_count} 次 OOC，{'超過門檻(>3)' if condition_met else '未超過門檻'}", "outputs": {"ooc_count": ooc_count, "records": records, "condition_summary": "超標" if condition_met else "正常"}, "impacted_lots": []}"}]
output_schema: [{"key": "ooc_count", "type": "scalar", "label": "OOC 次數", "unit": "次", "description": "最近5次 process 中超出控制限的次數"}, {"key": "records", "type": "table", "label": "最近5次 Process 記錄", "columns": [{"key": "spc_status", "label": "SPC狀態", "type": "str"}, {"key": "value", "label": "量測值", "type": "float"}, {"key": "ucl", "label": "UCL", "type": "float"}, {"key": "lcl", "label": "LCL", "type": "float"}, {"key": "is_ooc", "label": "是否OOC", "type": "bool"}], "description": "機台最近5次 SPC process 快照記錄"}, {"key": "condition_summary", "type": "badge", "label": "診斷結論", "description": "OOC次數是否大於3次：超標 or 正常"}]
